-- 1 of 7 --

The Business Launch Formula, Part 1
!
Now I want to focus on the Business Launch Formula.
!
Imagine doing a really great launch of your business. What would that mean for your
business? What would it mean for your life if you did a great launch? What would that
mean in terms of money? How much money would that be for you? What would that
mean in terms of your list build, like how many people you added to your list?
!
What would it mean in terms of your positioning in the marketplace, where you would
be seen as an expert? What would it mean for your lifestyle? Could you go full time, get
that new home, get that new car, take that vacation, or send your kids to a great
school?
!
It’s pretty cool to think about what a really great launch could do. People have all
different kinds of numbers when they think about this. Some people think, “I’m going to
do $10 million on my launch.” Some people say, “It would be really awesome if I did
$300 in my launch.” It’s all over the place.
!
For me, I had very humble beginnings. I didn’t have a lot of outside reference points to
look at. I didn’t have any entrepreneurs in my family. I wasn’t thinking that big. I was
thinking for me, a $10,000 launch seemed like the ultimate that I could possibly get.
When I thought of an income, $100,000 would be absolutely amazing.
!
It’s sort of funny. When I applied for my first merchant account —you get a merchant
account so you can process credit cards— back then, in 1997 or 1998 it was a lot
harder to get a merchant account. You had to go through this big, long process.
!
I remember when I got approved for it I got a call from the bank. This woman said,
“Hey, we approved you for $4,000 a month, but if you do business for a few months
and do really good, I’m sure we’ll be able to knock you up to $10,000 a month.” When
she said that to me I literally laughed.
!
I laughed because I thought, “$10,000 in a single month? Right, when am I going to do
that?” The great thing is she said, “Don’t you laugh. You’re going to be there before you
know it. You’re going to be doing those kind of numbers before you know it.” It was
great for her to call me on that, but $10,000 just seemed impossible.
!
I did that first launch with $1650. Actually, I had done that before I even had the
merchant account. We just took checks for that launch. That’s all we could do.
Copyright © All Rights Reserved Internet Alchemy, Inc. 2014 -2015 	Page ! 2
PLF_Module1v1.0
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 2 of 7 --

That number, that $10,000 was sort of in my head. A $10,000 launch was like the
ultimate launch that I could think of. The funny thing is, within a year I was there. I
was basically at a $10,000 launch and within three years I was at $100,000 launch. I
was literally ten times my ultimate goal within three years.
!
Then about 11 years from there I did a launch that was almost four million dollars. We
did that in about two and a half days. If you do the math, that was like 400 times my
ultimate dream. It wasn’t 400 times my income, it was 400 times my ultimate dream
back then.
!
What I’m saying is, when you do these launches and you put this stuff to work in your
business, the results can be shocking.
I’m not promising you’re going to do 300 times what you dream is or 10 times what
your dream is. Like I said, everyone has different numbers they’ve got rolling around in
their head.
!
When you start to put the business launch in place you can really start to leverage up in
your results. Again, this is no income claims and I’m not going to guarantee that you’re
going to do any of this, but in a lot of ways this is going to be easier for you. I didn’t
have any role models back then. I didn’t have anyone teaching me this stuff. I had to
figure it out again.
!
I’m just sharing some of the numbers I had. Frankly, I’ve seen some crazy things
among my Product Launch Formula owners as well. That’s what we’re going to be
talking about in this section, the Business Launch Formula, how you can use the
Product Launch Formula to build an amazing business.
!
This is what the Business Launch Formula comes down to...you have a list, and if you
don’t have one now you’re going to start building one. Launches are a great way to
build one. You’re going to start building this list, and then you periodically will do
launches.
!
When you do a launch, you end up delivering a lot of great value and great
content. You actually build your relationship within your launch. A lot of people
think you send a bunch of emails to your list. They’re going to get mad at you. They’re
not going to like you anymore.
!
The reality is that when you do a launch you build your relationship with your
subscribers. Because you did that launch, they see you as an expert. They see you as
Copyright © All Rights Reserved Internet Alchemy, Inc. 2014 -2015 	Page ! 3
PLF_Module2v1.0
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 3 of 7 --

someone who is giving stuff and they love you for it. In that process you build up your
relationship with the list.
!
You often will actually build your list just through word of mouth even if you don’t have
any affiliates or joint venture partners. In this process you will inevitably, with all the
feedback you get during a launch, you’re going to learn about the next product to
create. The best product ideas you get are going to come during and just after your
launch. You’re going to get the great ideas.
!
Now you’ve built your relationship to your list, and then you come back and do another
launch for that next product.
!
You do that launch for your next product, and you‘re building your relationship and
building your list. It’s feeding right back into your list and you get an idea for the next
product.
!
I’m going to go walk through a few examples for you. This really is the fundamental
core of the Business Launch Formula, that you’re always building your list and your
relationship with that list. You’re regularly sending them great offers that are highly
relevant that they really want because you’re getting all of this great feedback during
the launch.
!
When you do the launch for these great offers, it builds your list and it builds your list
relationship. It builds your product portfolio and it builds your position in the market.
!
It’s all pretty simple. Right? See how that works? It’s just this beautiful thing that just
keep revolving around.
!
Let’s look at an example. The example I’m going to use is John Gallagher. I love talking
about John because he’s such an amazing example, an amazing story. Here is a guy
that was literally on food stamps with a wife and two young kids. He had this passion
for edible medicinal herbs and plants.
!
I’m talking about going out into the backyard and picking some lavender or comfrey or
some stinging nettle, and you’re going in the house and turning it into either medicine
or food. He’s really passionate about this. He’s passionate about teaching people.
!
He had this little list. It was a newsletter. He had 1800 people who had joined that
newsletter. This is the one that he started with the borrowed laptop and borrowed Wi-
Fi. It was about as bare bones as you could get.
Copyright © All Rights Reserved Internet Alchemy, Inc. 2014 -2015 	Page ! 4
PLF_Module1v1.0
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 4 of 7 --

!
Then he created this board game. I’m blanking on the name right now, but he created
a board game about edible and medicine plants and herbs. He did that launch to his list
and sold 12 of them. He bought Product Launch Formula and did a proper product
launch. He came back to that same list and sold 670.
!
That’s a perfect A/B example, like an A/B test. Here’s the A without Product Launch
Formula and here’s the B with Product Launch Formula. Then at launch the board game
sold for $30 to $35. We’re talking about $20,000. Not bad when you’re on food stamps.
It really just paid for all of the board games that he had made up, but still he had some
momentum.
!
John had the PLF bug at that point. He had this herbal kit. This is a physical kit. I don’t
know what you did with it, but it helped you take those plants you picked in your
backyard and turn them into tinctures or whatever.
!
He had that herbal kit, a physical thing, and he sold it for I think $50. He did a launch.
He had that warm list now after doing the board game launch. He launched his herbal
kit and boom, he sold a whole bunch of them. He was basically doing a launch once a
month. They’d have to make up the kits, with all the neighbors coming over to his
house to help him. He’d make these kits up and be ready to send them.
!
Each month he’d make up a bunch of kits and then he would do a launch for those.
He’s now sold $250,000 of kits. That was about 6 years ago when he started doing this,
and all through this he kept building his list and building his list. I’ll get to the number
he’s at for the list build in a bit, but it’s pretty crazy.
!
Then he created a membership site. I think it’s at LearningHerbs.com. He did this
launch for the membership site. I think it’s $10 to $14 a month. He did a launch for
that. He put 350 people in that. If you do the math, 350 people times $10 a month is
$3500 a month.
!
Then a few months later he did a re-launch of that and put another 500 people in. He
lost some people through attrition, but the total was 800. Now if you do the math,
that’s $8000. Now, $8000 a month, that’s $96,000 a year. You throw in doing an herbal
kit launch every month. You throw in doing a board game re-launch every now and
then. All of a sudden you’ve got a business at six figures.
!

-- 5 of 7 --

The funny thing is, the last time I profiled John these were his numbers. I remember
when he did that launch for 350 and he was ecstatic about that. $3500 a month that’s a
real income. He’s got 350 people. He could see where this was going.
!
Just a couple of hours ago I called up John just to get an update on these numbers. I
said, “John, what are you at now for that membership site?” He said, “We’re at 3000
users, but let me tell you Jeff, we’re moving over our platform and for the last three or
four months we’ve been migrating over to a different membership platform. We’ve been
doing all of this behind the scenes upgrading stuff, so yes we’re only at 3000 people.”
He was making excuses for only having 3000 people.
!
This is what the Business Launch Formula does for you.
!
Just a few years ago he was really happy with 350 and now he’s making excuses why
he’s only at 3000 people. Right now he’s at 3000 people. If you do the math that equals
$30,000 a month, and this is just a little piece of his business.
!
He keeps on selling the board game. He’s now sold 30,000 board games. If you do the
math on that, at $30 or $35 dollars, that’s a million dollars right there. Again, he’s not
doing that number every year, but that’s a million dollars that will last six-ish years.
Now he’s rolled out additional home study courses, video courses.
!
He has done five video courses now. He keeps rolling those out, does several launches
a year. These sell for between $100 and $200. His launches for these have done
between $200,000, and his best launch to date is $330,000.
!
You throw in a couple of $200,000 launches, throw in $30,000 a month, the sales that
keep coming in for the herbal kit and the board game and you’re talking about serious,
serious seven figure to a million dollar business. He just started selling with a nice
launch. He had a very nice launch to start with, but it was just a start.
!
The thing is, did he have all of this planned out ahead of time? No, he just kept on
listening. It wasn’t like there was some big master plan. He started with that first
launch and then he just building his list, building his list relationship and he let his list,
his market, his customers define what he should do next.
!
This 1800 has grown to 80,000 people on his list. Because of the additional positioning
he has in his market, he’s seen as an expert. Every time he does a launch he gets more
and more subscribers because of all of that great content.
!

-- 6 of 7 --

We’re going to go through a little more detail on exactly how he orchestrates this in the
next video, but it all adds up to an amazing business. He’s literally gone from food
stamps, back when he bought Product Launch Formula, to having a seven figure
business. It’s absolutely amazing.
!
That shows how quickly this can happen for you and it’s all based on the Business
Launch Formula. In other words, it’s based on strategically using your launches to build
your list, your list relationship, your product portfolio and you positioning in the market.
!
In the next video I’m going to walk through how he orchestrates this and how they all
tie together. Then I’m going to give you a couple more examples as we move through
Business Launch Formula.
